sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. RGB and CMYK confirmed from official NFL Media Guide. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Green Bay Packers are a historic NFL franchise and the only publicly owned team in major American professional sports, founded in 1919 and based in Green Bay, Wisconsin. They play at Lambeau Field, one of the most storied venues in football, and compete in the NFC North. The Packers have won 13 NFL championships, including four Super Bowls.
